---
title: "Lyme Disease Ecology and Environmental Change"
---

# Lyme Disease Ecology and Environmental Change

This page will describe work or interests related to Lyme disease ecology, vector-borne disease systems, host communities, land use, and environmental change.

## Overview

Add project details here.

## Why it matters

Add broader relevance here.

## Methods and outputs

Add methods, collaborators, publications, presentations, or outputs here.
